nodes.name: Linaria
nodes.summary: Linaria（Linaria）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Yemen linnet、Warsangli linnet、黄嘴朱顶雀等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: Warsangli linnet
nodes.summary: The Warsangli linnet (Linaria johannis) is a species of finch in the family Fringillidae. It is found only in Somalia. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forest and subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland. It is threatened by habitat loss. The Warsangli linnet has not yet been examined genetically; it was formerly placed in the genus Carduelis but was assigned to the genus Linaria based on its plumage similarities to the common linnet Linaria cannabina. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Warsangli linnet (Linaria johannis) is a species of finch in the family Fringillidae. It is found only in Somalia.
